# completion

```go
import "github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/internal/commands/completion"
```

Package completion contains reusable completion matching and formatting helpers.

<a name="ReviewMatchKindUser"></a>

```go
const (
    // ReviewMatchKindUser identifies user review-matching options.
    ReviewMatchKindUser = "user"
    // ReviewMatchKindTeam identifies team review-matching options.
    ReviewMatchKindTeam = "team"
)
```

```go
func ApplyCSVCompletionPrefix(prefix string, values []string) []string
```

```go
func CompleteReviewMatchOptions(toComplete string, options []ReviewMatchOption, matchFinder func(token string, options []ReviewMatchOption) []ReviewMatchOption) []string
```

```go
func SplitCSVCompletionToken(input string) (string, string)
```

<a name="ReviewMatchOption"></a>
## type [ReviewMatchOption](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/internal/commands/completion/helpers.go#L12-L18>)

ReviewMatchOption is the completion helper view over resolver matches.

```go
type ReviewMatchOption struct {
    Resolved string
    Label    string
    Detail   string
    Fields   []string
    Kind     string
}
```
